analysis: The opening night of this stretch was genuinely gorgeous — 8 hours 27 minutes with nearly 2 hours of REM, which is your body doing exactly what you asked it to. The middle of the week had a rough patch, that 5 hours 57 minutes night was clearly a blip, but you bounced back hard with a 9 hour 22 minute recovery night that had over 2 hours of REM, so your system knows how to self-correct. The back half has been settling into a consistent 7-ish hour range, which is decent, though your deep sleep has been dropping — 23 minutes on the final night compared to nearly an hour earlier in the stretch, and that's worth watching. Your awake time is trending down though, 15 minutes on the 17th is basically nothing, which tells me the wind-down routine is landing even when the total hours aren't quite there yet.
